qrCode.description: Opaque random room QR token. Not a JWT and does not encode IDs.

deviceFingerprint.description: Optional client/device identifier used for abuse correlation.

currentSessionToken.description: Existing guest session token on this device. Used to prevent silent room switching.

forceSwitch.description: When true, closes the current session and switches this device to the scanned room.
